description: 150+ security rules for Python applications covering Django, Flask, Pyramid, AWS Lambda, cryptography, JWT, and core language vulnerabilities

deserialization.name: Python Deserialization Security
deserialization.description: Unsafe deserialization vulnerabilities including pickle, PyYAML, jsonpickle, marshal, shelve, and dill (CWE-502)

django.name: Django Security Rules
django.description: 28 Django framework security rules covering SQL injection, command injection, code injection, XSS, SSRF, path traversal, CSRF, email injection, and insecure deserialization

flask.name: Flask Security Rules
flask.description: 29 Flask framework security rules covering SQL injection, command injection, code injection, XSS, SSRF, SSTI, path traversal, open redirect, CSV injection, deserialization, and configuration audit

lang.name: Python Core Language Security
lang.description: 57 rules for Python core language vulnerabilities including dangerous eval/exec, OS command injection, subprocess shell injection, insecure hashing, SSL/TLS misconfigurations, XML External Entity injection, SQL injection, insecure transport, and network security

cryptography.name: Cryptography Security Rules
cryptography.description: 23 rules detecting insecure cipher algorithms (RC4, Blowfish, DES), weak hash functions (MD5, SHA1), insufficient key sizes (RSA, DSA, EC), and unauthenticated cipher modes (ECB, CBC without HMAC)

jwt.name: JWT Security Rules
jwt.description: 5 rules detecting JWT vulnerabilities including hardcoded secrets, none algorithm attacks, unverified signature decoding, and credential exposure in JWT payloads

aws_lambda.name: AWS Lambda Security Rules
aws_lambda.description: 17 rules for serverless security covering command injection via event data, SQL injection across database drivers (MySQL, PostgreSQL, pymssql, PyMySQL, SQLAlchemy), XSS in API Gateway responses, and code injection

pyramid.name: Pyramid Security Rules
pyramid.description: 3 rules for Pyramid framework covering CSRF protection bypass, direct response XSS, and SQLAlchemy SQL injection
